title: (Preview) of CD-I The Universal Prison Link Nukem Universal Prison
description:
This is only a preview showing about 6 minutes of a major battle in the next part of the Pokemon Tournament, I uplaoded this video only to show than I'm not *Dead* and than I'm working on the next part right now.

The reason why it take so freaking long is because this is a HUGE video and I'm working really slow on it I'm taking my take... xD

Song names

1: Hack//G.U - Everything In These Hands
2: Metal Gear Rising Revengeance - It Has to Be This Way
